```plantuml @startuml class HomeViewController <> { ~emailTextField : UITextField! ~passwordTextField : UITextField! ~displayNameTextField : UITextField! -- -onSubmitButtonTapped(_:) -attemptRegister() -attemptLogin() } class "HomeViewController" as HomeViewControllerExt <> { displayError(_:) displayMessage(_:) loginDidSucceed() registerDidSucceed() } note top of HomeViewControllerExt : «extension» class FirebaseAuthProvider <> { ~fbUser : User? ~user : DTUser? -- +init() +signUp(email:password:displayName:) +login(email:password:) -setUserDisplayName(_:) } class DTAuth <> { {static} ~user : DTUser? -- {static} +signUp(email:password:displayName:) {static} +login(email:password:) } interface DTAuthDelegate <> <

> { +displayError(_:) +displayMessage(_:) +loginDidSucceed() +registerDidSucceed() } class "User" as UserExt <> { toDTUser() } note top of UserExt : «extension» interface DTAbstractAuthProvider <> <

> { ~user : DTUser? -- +signUp(email:password:displayName:) +login(email:password:) } class DTUser <> <> { +uid : String +displayName : String +email : String } HomeViewController --> FirebaseAuthProvider HomeViewController --> HomeViewControllerExt HomeViewController --> DTAuth : sends auth events to HomeViewControllerExt ..|> DTAuthDelegate : <> FirebaseAuthProvider --> DTAuthDelegate : sends events FirebaseAuthProvider --> UserExt : converts to DTUser using DTAuth ..|> DTAbstractAuthProvider DTAuth "1" --> DTUser DTAbstractAuthProvider --> DTUser : 1 @enduml ```
